name: Fitzpatrickhotels.com
message: [AI generated] Fitzpatrick Hotels operates two boutique hotels in New York City, providing Irish-style hospitality to guests. Established in the late 20th century, the family-owned business primarily caters to those who value warmth, charm, and a touch of old-world elegance. Their hotels, Fitzpatrick Manhattan and Fitzpatrick Grand Central, boast a strategic location, iconic Irish pub-style restaurants, sophisticated amenities, and rooms.
